text:
For LaTeX209 file ...

% file test1.tex
test1.tex: LaTeX document text

  For LaTeX2e file ...

% file test2.tex
test2.tex: ASCII text

  We use \documentclass in LaTeX2e documents, as well as we use \documentstyle
in LaTeX209 documents.

Fix: Apply following patch.
How-To-Repeat: 
  Always
